mapper.select: SELECT s.student_id, -- 学生编号 s.name, -- 学生姓名 s.age, -- 学生年龄 c.course_name, -- 课程名称 sc.score -- 考试分数 FROM student s LEFT JOIN sc ON s.student_id = sc.student_id LEFT JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.course_id
SELECT s.name, c.course_name, sc.score FROM student s LEFT JOIN sc ON s.student_id = sc.student_id LEFT JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.course_id WHERE s.name = #{studentName}
SELECT DISTINCT s.name FROM student s LEFT JOIN sc ON s.student_id = sc.student_id LEFT JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.course_id WHERE c.course_name = '高等数学' AND sc.score > 80
